case_title: J CARLO CANNELL VS. AUTO RETURN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE.
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE -GRANTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANNELL, J CARLO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN $701.95 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $741.95 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANNELL, J CARLO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $701.95 FILED BY CANNELL, J CARLO AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTOPONE TRIAL -GRANTED.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AUTO RETURN IS GRANTED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VICE PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AUTO RETURN SET FOR JUL-31-2012 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-27-2012 AT 6:30 PM IN 506.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANNELL, J CARLO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT WAS GRANTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN HEARING SET FOR JUL-31-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
